settings.sqQuestion1: Zita rechipfuwo chako chekutanga chaive chii?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Kana ukakanganwa password yako, unogona kuwanazve kuwana nekupindura mibvunzo mitatu. Iwe unogona kushandisa mibvunzo yako pachako kana iyo yakasarudzika.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Cheki yemwedzi - ita shuwa kuti unorangarira password yako yekupinda.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Isu tinokukurudzira kuti uvandudze password yako iwe uchinge wapinda mukati, kuti usarasikirwe nekuwana.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Bvisa media cache uye data yenguva pfupi?

Encryption kiyi uye marongero HAZVICHADZIMWA.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Session inofanirwa kunge ichishanda kweanenge mazuva manomwe kuti uchinje password.

Nguva yasara: {daysLeft} mazuva.
settings.waitDaysWarning: 7 days hadzisati dzapera. Ndokumbira umire {daysLeft} mamwe mazuva.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Geolocation yarambwa.

1. macOS: System Settings → Yakavanzika → Nzvimbo Services → gonesa browser
2. Bhurawuza: tinya chiratidzo chekiyi mubhawa rekero → Nzvimbo → Bvumira
3. Rodhazve peji
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Geolocation yarambwa.

Dzvanya chiratidzo chekiyi mubhari yekero → Nzvimbo → Bvumira, wozorodha peji yacho

panic.callSettingsNote: Cherechedza: Nzira dze Force TCP uye Relay dzinogona kuwedzera kufamba kunonoka asi dzinopa kuvanda kwakanyanya. Kufukidza traffic kunowedzera kudzika kusina kufungidzirwa kumisangano yeSDP.
panic.desc: Ruzivo rwose pano node ruchagurwa nekusingaperi. Chiito ichi hachingadzoswe.
panic.warningBody:
Wave kuda kuparadza zvachose data rese.
Ichi chiito hachigone kuregererwa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Maronda ese abviswa. Chirongwa ichi chapera.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Kiyi itsva yemba inogamuchirwa — tuma otomatiki kuzvishandiso zvako zvose (E2E yakakomiwa)
privacy.backupHint: Komba makiyi ose nepasiwedi uye sachira kuseva. Chinja zvishandiso — dzosa nechinongedzero chimwe.
privacy.crossSignHint: Simbisa zvishandiso zvitsva otomatiki nekusaina kweHMAC (kudzivirira kutsivana)
privacy.federatedHint: Govera zvikamu zvechikuva chakakomiwa pane nodes dzefederation. Kunyange seva yarasika — dzosa nekuburikidza neshamwari.
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi yakakomiwa yemeseji inowanikwa pazvishandiso zvose. Seva inona ruzha rwega
privacy.ktHint: Log inowedzerwa chete yemishanduko yose yemakiyi eruzhinji ine ketani yehash (Merkle). Seva inosainia chekupinda chimwe nechimwe — nhema inoonekwa panguva yekuongorora.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Endesa makiyi kuzvishandiso zvitsva nekuburikidza nechinhu chechiverengwa 6. Makiyi akakomiwa neECIES — seva haigoni kuaerenga.
privacy.ssssHint: Patsanura kiyi huru kuzvikamu N. Zvikamu zvimwe zvivi M zvichadzosa kiyi. Chikamu chimwe nechimwe chakakomiwa kumukurukuri wako wekuvimba nawo (ECIES). Seva inona blobs dzakakomiwa chete.
privacy.title: Kuvanda

contactSync.title: Tsvaga macontacts ako
contactSync.desc: Tarisa kuti ndeupi wefoni yako yekubata atova paVortex. Nhamba dzenhare dzinokurumidza - sevha haimbodziona.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Passphrase inofanira kunge iine mavara masere
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Isa iyi kodhi pamudziyo wako mukuru
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Isa izwi rekupfuura rekunyorera. Zvirangarire - kupora pasina izvozvo hazvibviri.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Isa chirevo chawakashandisa paunenge uchigadzira backup.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Kudzima kiyi yekuchengetedza? Chiito ichi hachidzoreki.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Ukanzure zvikamu zvese zvakakosha? Kudzoreredza kuburikidza nevanhu vanovimbwa navo hazvigoneke.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Yako tenzi kiyi ichakamurwa kuita N share uchishandisa Shamir chirongwa. Chero M migove inobvumira kiyi kudzoreredza. Kugova kwega kwega kwakavharirwa kune mumwe munhu anovimba naye.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Kanokwana 2 vezera vanoshanda vane encryption inodiwa
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Kudzima backup yemubatanidzwa? Shards pavezera ichasara, asi metadata icharasika.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
